data.body:
Release v0.7.0 channel status:
- pyproject.toml + server.json 0.7.0: MERGED (change 315). ✓
- PyPI: 0.7.0 live. ✓
- GitHub Release: v0.7.0 exists + marked Latest, artifacts attached. NOTE: created MANUALLY (one-off) — the auto github_release job FAILED on the v0.7.0 tag (gh had no repo context; run 28763401143). Dogfood found the bug; fix (GH_REPO) merged as change 316 (bug 8ed5, closed). The AC 'created automatically by the workflow' was NOT met for v0.7.0 specifically — it WILL be met on the next tag release (v0.7.1+) via the merged fix.
- Homebrew tap: Formula/rebar.rb bumped to 0.7.0 (url+sha256), pushed to navapbc/homebrew-rebar. ✓
- Smoke test: published 0.7.0 passes end-to-end (init/create/claim/comment/close/fsck + rebar-mcp). Full probe blocked only by no-TTY auto-init in the bg shell (not a 0.7.0 defect). ✓
- MCP Registry: BLOCKED — publisher token expired; needs interactive `mcp-publisher login github` (browser/device auth) which cannot run headlessly. Awaiting operator login, then `mcp-publisher publish` of server.json (0.7.0).

Ticket stays in_progress until MCP Registry is published.
